# meta-random

Sleeves that are mixed, experimental, broad-spectrum, or do not fit neatly into a single domain yet.

## Sleeves in this category
- [neomagnetar-dynamic-persona-v1](./neomagnetar-dynamic-persona-v1/README.md)

## What each sleeve folder contains
- `sleeve.json`
- `README.md`
- `STRUCTURE.md`
- `NEOSTACKS.md`
- `NEOBLOCKS.md`
- `MOLT-BLOCKS.md`
